subject: security(codes): expand chat code word lists from ~2,300 to ~42,600 combinations
body:
Previous 48x48 word lists made brute-force enumeration of all chat codes
trivial. Expanded to 199 adjectives x 214 nouns for ~42,586 unique codes.
Removed duplicate "amber" from adjectives. Updated CLAUDE.md to reflect
new word list sizes.

Tags: security, chat-codes
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_014U3rmSp48YxMqy3jrS4rQ8
title: expand chat code word lists from ~2,300 to ~42,600 combinations
